'''nasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jumpily|jumpily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jumpily|jumpily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nasate|nasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nasatesher|nasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasatesherĂ«m|nasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nasatero|nasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nasateshĂ«|nasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasateshĂ«m|nasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinasatero|gokinasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinasateshĂ«|gokinasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasateshĂ«m|gokinasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonasankerom|gonasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonasankeshĂ«|gonasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasankeshĂ«m|gonasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonasankeya|gonasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nasaterom|nasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasatemu|nasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nasateya|nasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinasaterom|gokinasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasatemu|gokinasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinasateya|gokinasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nasasate|nasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nasasatesher|nasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasasatesherĂ«m|nasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nasasatero|nasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nasasateshĂ«|nasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasasateshĂ«m|nasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinasasatero|gokinasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinasasateshĂ«|gokinasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasasateshĂ«m|gokinasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonasasankerom|gonasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonasasankeshĂ«|gonasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasasankeshĂ«m|gonasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonasasankeya|gonasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nasasaterom|nasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasasatemu|nasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nasasateya|nasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinasasaterom|gokinasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasasatemu|gokinasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinasasateya|gokinasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠte|nĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠtesher|nĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠtero|nĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠsĂŠtero|gokinĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠterom|nĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠtemu|nĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠteya|nĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠsĂŠteya|gokinĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafsafte|nafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafsaftesher|nafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafsaftesherĂ«m|nafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafsaftero|nafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafsafteshĂ«|nafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafsafteshĂ«m|nafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafsaftero|gokinafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafsafteshĂ«|gokinafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafsafteshĂ«m|gokinafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafsafnkerom|gonafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafsafnkeshĂ«|gonafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafsafnkeshĂ«m|gonafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafsafnkeya|gonafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafsafterom|nafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafsaftemu|nafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafsafteya|nafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafsafterom|gokinafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafsaftemu|gokinafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafsafteya|gokinafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
